title: Aliens At FIFA World Cup 2026? Psychic Makes Viral Claim Of UFO Invasion During Brazil Vs Scotland Match |VIDEO
description: A Brazilian psychic's bizarre prediction of an alien invasion during the FIFA World Cup 2026 match between Brazil and Scotland in Miami has gone viral online. Vo Bahiana, who has over 23 million followers, claims recurring dreams showed UFOs abducting players and fans from Hard Rock Stadium. Despite widespread attention on social media, there is no evidence supporting her extraordinary claims.

title: What should the UAP Scientific Advisory Board do?
description: There are more and more frauds, charlatans, and lunatics entering this area of inquiry. It is important to stay disciplined on data-driven questions, most importantly to what extent are released (and unreleased) videos backed by radar, satellite, eyewitness and other forms of confirming evidence?
